gold.title: Date Wheel Picker
gold.reason: iOS-style drum-roll wheel picker built with Framer Motion pan gestures and useMotionValue transforms — a unique, tactile interaction that would make any mobile-first booking page stand out.

gold.title: Date Picker
gold.reason: Animated weekly date picker with Framer Motion AnimatePresence slide transitions between weeks — polished, mobile-friendly, and visually distinctive for scheduling pages.

gold.title: Event Aquarium Calendar
gold.reason: Aquarium-themed visual metaphor for events — a bold, memorable creative concept that signals product personality on a landing page.

silver.title: Datetime Picker
silver.reason: Timescape-powered segmented datetime input with per-segment keyboard editing — accessible, polished UX pattern well above a plain input.

silver.title: Date Field [react-aria-components]
silver.reason: Segment-by-segment react-aria DateField with CVA variants and full TypeScript props — clean, accessible, and functionally solid.

silver.title: Datetime Picker
silver.reason: Keyboard-navigable TimePickerInput with arrow key support, Select for AM/PM, and Label structure — thoughtfully built form utility.

silver.title: Event Scheduler
silver.reason: Full event scheduler with date/time pickers, Clock icon, PlusCircle add, Trash2 delete, and Card layout — a complete functional widget.

bronze.title: Date picker
bronze.reason: The canonical shadcn date picker example — a basic Popover wrapping the base Calendar with format() display. No meaningful visual upgrade beyond the shadcn default.
